vision.heading: Our Mission
vision.missionLead: Redesigning the structures of industry and culture.
vision.missionStatement: Redesigning the structures of industry and culture.
vision.philosophyPrimary: We are a disruptive force that fundamentally transforms industries long dominated by conventional SaaS and system integrators, reshaping their very structures through our products. We dismantle entrenched industry conventions and irrational systems, fusing our own philosophy with technology to redesign the underlying <ldquo></ldquo>mechanisms<rdquo></rdquo> of society, industry, and culture. We are far more than a technology vendor: we overturn the assumptions of an industry and build the foundations for entirely new value, remaining a force for genuine innovation.
vision.philosophySecondary: 私たちは、SaaSやSIerが蔓延る業界自体を徹底的に変える破壊的な存在として、提供する産業の構造をプロダクトで根本から変革します。既存の業界慣習や非合理な構造を壊し、独自の思想とテクノロジーを融合させて、社会・産業・文化の“仕組み”そのものを再設計する企業です。単なる技術提供者ではなく、業界の常識を覆し、新たな価値創造の基盤を築く革新的な存在であり続けます。
